label: 拼贴波普版
texture_guidance: paper cut edges、stickers、tape strips、halftone dots、错位色块和手撕纸纹。
scene_prompt: COLLAGE POP SOCIAL POSTER. light: flat studio light with minimal realistic shadow, each paper piece casts only a tiny 2-4px contact shadow; avoid cinematic depth. material: paper cut edges, stickers, tape strips, halftone dots, marker strokes, torn receipt scraps, printed coupon shapes. color: vivid tomato red #F04438, electric blue #2563EB, lime #A3E635, cream #FFF3D6; use 3 dominant colors only, no muddy gradients. composition: dense collage layout with 5-8 layered graphic pieces; main title sits on a tilted sticker occupying 25-32% of canvas; food cue is a cutout or simplified photo-card occupying 35-45%. avoid: no realistic restaurant scene, no luxury lighting, no 3D diorama, no symmetrical corporate poster, no uncontrolled clutter beyond planned paper layers.
design_lessons: 社交传播的抓眼点来自可截图的图形层次，而不是单纯加饱和度。
